objective: Eliminate all hardcoded provider imports and instantiations outside the LLM factory

executive_summary.problem: Architecture had hardcoded GeminiClient instantiations in PipelineService, API dependencies, and CLI, preventing provider swapping without code changes
executive_summary.solution: Implemented factory pattern with dependency injection, making provider selection purely configuration-driven
executive_summary.impact: Provider can now be swapped by changing .env file only - no code changes required

implementation_steps_completed.name: CREATE PROVIDER FACTORY
implementation_steps_completed.description: Created get_llm_client() factory function that reads LLM_PROVIDER from config and instantiates correct adapter

implementation_steps_completed.name: MAKE CONFIG PROVIDER-AGNOSTIC
implementation_steps_completed.description: Renamed GEMINI_API_KEY to LLM_API_KEY, added LLM_PROVIDER field with validation

implementation_steps_completed.name: FIX PipelineService
implementation_steps_completed.description: Removed GeminiClient import, added LLMClient dependency injection with factory fallback

implementation_steps_completed.name: FIX API DEPENDENCIES
implementation_steps_completed.description: Removed GeminiClient import, updated get_llm_service() to use factory

implementation_steps_completed.name: FIX CLI
implementation_steps_completed.description: Removed GeminiClient import, added factory import

implementation_steps_completed.name: VERIFY CLEAN ARCHITECTURE
implementation_steps_completed.description: Verified GeminiClient only imported in: gemini_client.py, factory.py, __init__.py (re-export)

implementation_steps_completed.name: ADD SWAP TEST
implementation_steps_completed.description: Created comprehensive test suite verifying provider swappability

architecture_after.pipeline_service: llm_client = get_llm_client() if llm_client is None

provider_swap_process.description: How to swap from Gemini to another provider
steps: 2. Change LLM_PROVIDER=gemini to LLM_PROVIDER=mock (or other provider)

adding_new_provider_process.description: How to add a new provider (e.g., OpenAI)
steps: 3. Update supported providers list in app/core/config.py validator

config_keys.migration_guide: Rename GEMINI_API_KEY to LLM_API_KEY and add LLM_PROVIDER=gemini in .env

immediate: Update documentation to reflect new config keys
